titles.title: I Am a Soldier Bound to Glory

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm a soldier bound for Glory, I’m a soldier going home; Come and hear me tell my story, All who love the Saviour, come.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I love Jesus, hallelujah! I love Jesus, yes, I do; I love Jesus, he’s my Saviour, Jesus smiles and loves me too.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will tell you what induced me In the glorious fight to start; ‘Twas the Saviour’s loving kindness Overcame and won my heart.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When I first commenced my warfare Many said I’d run away; But they all have been deceived, In the fight I am today.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I’m a wonder unto many, God alone the change has wrought; Here I raise my Ebenezer, Hither by his help I’m brought.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: When to death’s dark, swelling river, Like a warrior I shall come, Then I mean to shout salvation! And go singing glory! home.
